大发老版本3.0.0【网：59FC·CC】【网：95FC·CC】【QQ：5075273】【网：35FC·CC】<浏览器手动输入网址>【首单返利50%】【来富彩，马上发】【富彩祝您】【鸿运当头好运来】【财源滚滚为您开】【精彩纷呈乐不停】【大奖小奖进家门】JINYUAN666《金源导师》<br>原文翻译及赏析_作者李白<br>青天有月来几时？我今停杯一问之。<br>人攀明月不可得，月行却与人相随。<br>皎如飞镜临丹阙，绿烟灭尽清辉发。<br>但见宵从海上来，宁知晓向云间没。<br>白兔捣药秋复春，嫦娥孤栖与谁邻？<br>今人不见古时月，今月曾经照古人。<br>古人今人若流水，共看明月皆如此。<br>唯愿当歌对酒时，月光长照金樽里。<br>[![66.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/SsTM0tXD/66.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/hzmjTs1d)<br>[![67.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/C1kx7PGg/67.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/CBM0L4rP)<br>[![68.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/NM6QmycS/68.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/r0p6LwzN)<br>[![82.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/4NNXHNSg/82.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/z3Ms95Nt)<br>[![83.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/DwRhNQy8/83.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/K17CkMT2)<br>[![84.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/1XWhrwj1/84.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/dZTxqkF5)<br>------------------<br>vk.com/topic-231207851_59995389<br>vk.com/topic-231519063_58630031<br>vk.com/topic-237892963_58630035<br>vk.com/topic-231212102_58986031<br>vk.com/topic-238137146_58678339<br>vk.com/topic-231693913_58630037<br>vk.com/topic-231239256_58678340<br>vk.com/topic-231210224_58365722<br>vk.com/topic-231519063_58630055<br>vk.com/topic-231212102_58986047<br>vk.com/topic-238147933_58630075<br>vk.com/topic-238137148_58852976<br>vk.com/topic-231519063_58630088<br>vk.com/topic-231552752_58986079<br>vk.com/topic-237892963_58630094<br>vk.com/topic-238147933_58630112<br>vk.com/topic-238137148_58852998<br>vk.com/topic-238147954_58365766<br>vk.com/topic-231211297_59799430<br>vk.com/topic-237892963_58630133<br>vk.com/topic-238147933_58630141<br>vk.com/topic-238147986_58678427<br>vk.com/topic-231600846_58678423<br>vk.com/topic-231211300_59464812<br>vk.com/topic-231211297_59799449<br>vk.com/topic-238147933_58630166<br>vk.com/topic-231211503_58630164<br>vk.com/topic-237849573_58630171<br>vk.com/topic-231600846_58678449<br>vk.com/topic-231552752_58986137<br>vk.com/topic-231211300_59464827<br>vk.com/topic-238147969_59129684<br>vk.com/topic-231211503_58630193<br>vk.com/to
